query: I recently attended a conference and recorded the entire session with the filename 'graph_011_audio_1.wav'. I'm having trouble recalling all the important details discussed during the session. Can you transcribe the audio for me? Also, it would be great if you could highlight any named entities in the transcript. I have some notes ('My Conference Notes') I took during the conference, can you help me understand how closely aligned my notes are with the actual transcription?My meeting notes:"The meeting mainly focused on the current progress of the Apollo project. Zhang Wei mentioned that the core modules need to be completed by the end of March, and that testing resources should be coordinated with the Marketing Department to ensure on-time delivery."

nodes.requirement_spec: 对用户提供的音频文件 'graph_011_audio_1.wav' 进行语音识别，生成完整的会议文字转录稿。输出应为纯文本格式的转录结果。
对 node_1 生成的转录文本进行命名实体识别，识别并标注其中的人名、组织名、项目名、日期等实体。输出应包含实体列表及其类型。
计算用户提供的会议笔记文本（'My Conference Notes'）与 node_1 生成的完整转录文本之间的语义相似度，得到一个 [0,1] 区间的分数，用于衡量笔记与录音内容的对齐程度。

parameters.name: audio
parameters.annotation: typing.Union[bytes, typing.BinaryIO, str, pathlib.Path, ForwardRef('Image'), bytearray, memoryview]

best.reason: 基于Whisper-large-v3的优化版本，在语音识别任务上性能更强，尤其适合英语转录。

backups.reason: 专为语音识别设计，支持英语，在ASR任务上表现优异，适合会议转录。
虽支持语音识别，但主要是一个多模态对话模型，非专业ASR模型，对纯语音转录任务适配度一般。

best.reason: 经典英文句子相似度模型，轻量高效，在语义匹配任务上表现稳定。

backups.reason: 强大的多语言嵌入模型，支持密集检索和相似度计算，在英文任务上性能优异。
多语言模型，支持英文，在释义和相似度任务上表现良好。
强大的多语言E5模型，在跨语言和单语语义相似度任务上均有出色表现。
基于MPNet的模型，在句子相似度任务上通常比BERT-base模型有更好表现。

best.reason: 基于CoNLL-2003英文数据集，专门用于通用NER，完美匹配人名、组织名等需求。

backups.reason: 在CoNLL-2003英文上微调的大模型，通用NER能力优秀。
在CoNLL-2003上微调的英文大模型，是通用NER的标杆模型。
在CoNLL-2003英文上微调，多语言大模型，通用NER能力强。
在CoNLL-2003上微调的英文大模型，通用NER能力极强。

node_1.text: I'll give a brief update on the progress of the Apollo project. At this stage, the core modules are largely complete, at around 80%. The main remaining risk lies in the data interfaces, which still need to be reviewed and aligned with the marketing department as soon as possible. Based on the current pace, and assuming there are no changes in resource allocation, we plan to complete internal testing by March 28th. The testing phase will be primarily supported by the Beijing office, and I have already discussed the testing staffing requirements with Zhang Wei. Overall, the target remains unchanged. We aim for the Apollo project to go live as originally planned in Q2. If there are any adjustments along the way, I will communicate them promptly.

and I have already discussed the testing staffing requirements with Zhang Wei.
Overall, the target remains unchanged.
We aim for the Apollo project to go live as originally planned in Q2.
If there are any adjustments along the way, I will communicate them promptly.
